title: Harness Engineering Is AI’s New Gold Rush
summary: Harness engineering is an emerging approach that moves beyond prompt engineering by focusing on the system architecture around AI models. It emphasizes tools, memory, context, permissions, verification, recovery paths, and feedback loops to make AI agents reliable over time. Companies are building runtime systems with safeguards and workflows to differentiate models as the underlying model capabilities converge.
